title: D Block Begins
description: Pages 17–21 focus on d block begins, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as d Block begins with Rebecca hated by the crowd, until Cavendish turns the audience's cruelty back on itself and the battle begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm? Oh it's him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: OHH!! zero-dono!! zero-dono, we're over here, that we are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just how old are you, Wicca?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Keep it down, you fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who are they, looking so friendly with each other?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's "curly- browsland" and "top- Knotland.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whaaa you're going to save Nam-san!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So it's really that bad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No wonder she didn't pick up the Dender- mush!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Okay! I'm going too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wait, San- J1-Dono. We should remain here to inform Luffy-Dono of the situation.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Black leg!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Uoohhh my beloved vio- let-chan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You're going to end up past- silonately stabbed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Your ship has been taken by Jora, from our crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: They're heading for green bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Stop the ship!! You can't really mean to go to green bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohohoho my music and the ocean have made fabulous art!! Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Ohoho you sure said it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Brook, why are you acting so strangely!! Have you really betrayed us!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Ohohoho!! Law will sure be surprised, won't he!! He asked for someone to come and pick up Caesar...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: But instead of you guys, it will be me!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Bone-KICH!!! Can you really call yourself a swordsman!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: My eyes have finally been opened!! I am, after all, an artist!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: My reason for living is to produce great works!! Although I'm already dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: 'Knock it off! No need to explain yourself to these common- Ers, soul King!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: The passion that we need to express, more than anything else!! They could never understand!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Dying Art!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: This does not hurt at all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: urgh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Save us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: How won- default, Jora-san.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I'm so filled with emotion!! I've perfectly depicted the tragedy that befell dress- Rosa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: And in ten more minutes, you noisy children will also become a part of this art...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: At which point your lives will end!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Ehh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Brook!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Bone- Kichi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: How truly magnificent!! Please allow me to provide some musical acompani- ment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Would you really be so kind!? Soul King!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I'd like my violin, Jora-san!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Could you please return my violin and bow to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Here you go! Show me what you've got, brotha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Ahh i'm losing conscious- sness...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I don't wanna die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Now please look, Jo- Ra-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: My violin bow is in fact a cane sword...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Got it, got it. Now play so- mething good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Of course! I've already made the cut.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Hmm? Cut??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Painter's song...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: HitoyogIR!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: GyaHHHHHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: BROOK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: I'm sorry. I guess I don't really have an eye for art.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Because my eyes... are just empty sockets!!!

summary: D Block Begins focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as d Block begins with Rebecca hated by the crowd, until Cavendish turns the audience's cruelty back on itself and the battle begins.
